demo.name: Bonfire
description: This is the heart of your camp - without it, most workbenches and crafting stations won't function.
This is the place where you can rest and get Rested effect that improves your Stamina Recovery Rate

demo.name: Floor-Standing Torch
description: Perfect for exploring dark caves.

demo.name: Tent
description: Exploring unknown islands is always more pleasant when you have a tent to rest in.

demo.name: Fast Travel Point
description: Allows you to move quickly between the points.
Only 10 Fast Travel Points can be placed in the world.
Can't be built close to trading posts.

demo.name: Wharf
description: Allows you to manage your fleet, build ships, and repair them.

EA0_10.name: Signal Fire
description: Where was the Royal Fleet when Tortuga fell?
The light of the signal fire can be seen from afar.
Only 3 signal fires can be placed in the world.

description: Allows you to disassemble equipment and recover the resources used to craft it.

description: Workbench upgrade.

description: Sturdy iron dishes.

description: A bit of grog to warm up after a long voyage.

description: A hearty Stew Bowl to sustain the crew.

EA0_10.name: Corn Soup
description: Some corn soup to raise the spirits after a storm.

description: Sweets pirates usually enjoy at night, swinging in their hammocks.

description: Nutritious and filling meat from a raid on a well-stocked caravan.

description: A plate of forest mushrooms from a mysterious island.

description: A thick stew scented with forest-foraged ingredients.

description: Exotic fruits brought back from pirate raids.

description: Adds a bit of variety to a seafarer's diet.

EA0_10.name: Fresh Fruit Platter
description: Juicy fruits to ward off travel blues.

EA0_10.name: Luxurious Dinner
description: A feast for the captain and the whole crew.

EA0_10.name: Book
description: Clearly meant as a practical guide to navigation.
It contains remarks such as: "Spotting a reef is bad news. Not spotting it is worse."

EA0_10.name: Stack of Books
description: Tomes of weathered pages, scribbled with notes about storms, locations, and shady deals.

EA0_10.name: Stack of Books (Great)

EA0_10.name: Row of Books
description: Tomes of weathered pages, scribbled with notes about storms, locations, and shady deals.

EA0_10.name: Open Book
description: A list of stolen goods. Some items marked as sold, sunk or pocketed.

EA0_10.name: Scrolls
description: Scrolls with strange symbols that mark the route of illegal freight.

EA0_10.name: Open Scroll
description: The page depicts some kind of mechanism, though half of it is blacked out with ink.
A note at the bottom reads: "If something breaks, pretend it's the intended behavior."

EA0_10.name: Spyglass
description: They say a good captain spots the storm before the winds dare to shift.

EA0_10.name: Spyglass SNF
description: This spyglass shines because of you.
Thank you for sailing these seas before anyone else.

EA0_10.name: Ornamental Cannon
description: A cannon. They're loading it... Wait - they're going to fire!

EA0_10.name: Cannonballs
description: Stacking cannonballs can be fun, but rum is better.
